Name: Triennial
Definition: The event occurs every three years.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every three years.

Name: Biennial
Definition: The event occurs every two years.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every two years.

Name: Annual
Definition: The event occurs once a year.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every year.

Name: Semiannual
Definition: The event occurs twice a year.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated twice every year.

Name: Three times a year
Definition: The event occurs three times a year.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated three times every year.

Name: Quarterly
Definition: The event occurs every three months.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every three months.

Name: Bimonthly
Definition: The event occurs every two months.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every two months.

Name: Monthly
Definition: The event occurs once a month.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every month.

Name: Semimonthly
Definition: The event occurs twice a month.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated twice every month.

Name: Biweekly
Definition: The event occurs every two weeks.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every two weeks.

Name: Three times a month
Definition: The event occurs three times a month.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated three times every month.

Name: Weekly
Definition: The event occurs once a week.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every week.

Name: Semiweekly
Definition: The event occurs twice a week.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated twice every week.

Name: Three times a week
Definition: The event occurs three times a week.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated three times every week.

Name: Daily
Definition: The event occurs once a day.
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated once every day, usually exclusive of nonworking days.

Name: Irregular
RDADefinition: A frequency for a diachronic work that is issued or updated with no consistent interval between issues or updates.
